prompt: The /login endpoint has no protection against repeated attempts. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Throttle attempts per account and per IP (rate limiting / temporary lockout with backoff) and monitor for abuse
Hide the details in the error message

explanation: Rate limiting / lockout with backoff directly stops brute-force and credential-stuffing against this endpoint — the fix for CWE-307. Stronger passwords and bcrypt are good but don't limit attempt volume; hiding error detail is unrelated; a post-success CAPTCHA protects nothing.
source_reference: CWE-307; OWASP A07:2021 (Identification and Authentication Failures)

prompt: The /verify-otp endpoint has no protection against repeated attempts. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Hide the details in the error message
Add a CAPTCHA only after a successful login
